creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: ade
Date: Fri Oct 11 20:47:43 2013
New Revision: 330102
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/330102

Log:
  Don't split up the INFO docs -- PORTREVISION bumped for difference in
  packaging, but there's no need to rebuild everything that depends on
  devel/libtool.
  
  PR:		161984
  Submitted by:	Nali Toja <nalitoja@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/libtool/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/libtool/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/libtool/Makefile	Fri Oct 11 20:46:29 2013	(r330101)
+++ head/devel/libtool/Makefile	Fri Oct 11 20:47:43 2013	(r330102)
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME?=	libtool
 PORTVERSION=	2.4.2
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTREVISION=	2
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GNU}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	libtool
@@ -26,6 +26,10 @@ MAN1=		libtool.1 libtoolize.1
 .endif
 
 NO_STAGE=	yes
+
+post-extract:
+	@${RM} -f ${WRKSRC}/doc/*.info*
+
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|sed gsed|sed|g' \
 		-e 's|CC=cc|CC=${CC}|g' \
